publishers.notes: Dogfood entry. Yep publishes its own install-manifests via .well-known/ in drknowhow/Yep to validate the federation loop end-to-end. Marked 'verified' (maintainer-controlled) and downgraded to status='example' in the registry to keep clear visual separation between Yep's own tools and third-party publisher catalogs.

First external federation publisher. Muninn shipped 13 v0.4 install-manifests on 2026-05-27 (https://github.com/oaustegard/muninn-utilities/pull/48); the manifests were mirrored into the registry by hand in toolspace v0.11. This entry lets the federation-sync workflow take over future updates.
